title: Smoky Teff Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious Ethiopian-inspired stir fry made with smoky teff. Quick and easy to prepare, this dish is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the roasted onions and bell peppers, and cook until they start to soften.
Add the smoky teff and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring frequently.
Add the Ethiopian spices and cook for another minute, stirring constantly.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
